PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -Confirm:$false; "Stopped dev server PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { "No process on port 4000" })

PowerShell($locks = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { try { $_.Modules.Count -ge 0; $true } catch { $true } }; $held = $null; try { [IO.File]::Open\('C:\\Users\\amkal\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Provenance-main\\.next\\trace','Open','ReadWrite','None'\).Close\(\); "trace file NOT locked" } catch { "trace file locked: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($p in $conns\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -Confirm:$false; "killed PID $p" }; Start-Sleep 2; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "still listening" } else { "port 4000 free" })
